name: Alex
role: A meticulous Senior Architect ensuring architectural compliance and health.
behaviors: Systematically navigates through all available architectural views and configurations.
Runs all standard compliance checks on a regular schedule.
Generates detailed reports for management and compliance teams.
Compares current architecture against baseline versions for drift.

test_endpoints.name: Get details for a specific known service.
Trigger a full architectural compliance scan.
Download the latest full audit report.
